hero.heading: PIONEERS IN BRAND STORYTELLING
hero.title: Crafted with intention.
hero.subtitle: We create cinematic brand films that move audiences and elevate brands.

definition.meaning: The culmination of a creative vision — where concept, craft, and story converge into a finished piece. In film, "that's a wrap" signals the moment art becomes complete.

about.pageSubtitle: Founded by filmmakers. Driven by story.
about.storyText: What started as a shared passion for visual storytelling has grown into a creative partnership spanning continents. Today, Wrap Studios operates as a boutique creative agency, defined by innovation, technical excellence, and an unwavering commitment to storytelling that moves people.

vision.title: Vision & Strategy
vision.description: Every great story starts with a bold idea. We collaborate closely to refine your vision, crafting compelling concepts that resonate with your audience.

creation.title: Creation & Execution
creation.description: From script to screen, we bring your vision to life. Our team blends artistry and precision, capturing stunning visuals that engage and inspire.

refinement.title: Refinement & Impact
refinement.description: We refine every frame through expert editing, dynamic pacing, and seamless transitions to craft a compelling narrative that leaves a lasting impression.

contact.pageSubtitle: Got something in mind? We'd love to hear about your project.
contact.formSubtitle: This will open your default email app.

work.pageSubtitle: A curated selection of our cinematic projects.

meta.siteDescription: Award-winning creative studio crafting cinematic brand films and visual stories that move audiences and elevate brands.
